axis_responsibility.Agent: The performing Agent remains the receiver/returner only; this design does not classify Agent success or quality and does not create an AgentFact for the held adapter-error step.
axis_responsibility.Brick: The work invariant is the declared F16b contract: stop disposition on any adapter-error hold paper-closes without adapter invocation.
axis_responsibility.Link: The stop disposition and transition lifecycle refs remain Link evidence; support only reads the recorded reason refs and does not choose Movement or route target.
axis_responsibility.Support: support/operator/walker_resume.py performs the narrow resume predicate and paper-stop recording; support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py pins the invariant as support evidence.

candidate_file_changes: support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py: add the legacy fixture rewrite/helper and F16b assertions inside run_adapter_error_path_hardening.
checker_or_verifier_plan: Checker-first: extend adapter_error_path_hardening with the F16b legacy-shaped fixture before or with the predicate change.
Focused green evidence: compileall for touched Python support files, git diff --check, and the adapter_error_path_hardening focused checker.
Mutation evidence: monkeypatch the predicate back to flat-field-only and require the legacy fixture to fail RED.
Gate evidence after bake: run the full check_profile --all in a temp source copy and report the temp copy path.
returned.design_summary: Keep the repair in support only. Broaden the paper-stop predicate so adapter-error holds are recognized from either the new-engine flat hold_reason field or the legacy transition_lifecycle_reason_refs marker. Add a narrow checker pin in the existing adapter_error_path_hardening family using a synthetic legacy-shaped hold fixture copied from the observed 0612 reason-ref shape.
edge_cases: transition_lifecycle_reason_refs absent, non-list, or containing non-string entries should not broaden the match; flat hold_reason remains the only fallback.
A legacy row containing only the hyphenated adapter-error observation ref and not the underscored adapter_error_frontier marker should not match.
Synthetic fixture ids must preserve the current hold identity so disposition selection still addresses the same hold.

Mutation RED should distinguish failure to paper-stop from any unexpected adapter invocation; either violates the F16b invariant, but the captured runner should still assert zero calls on the real implementation.
invariants: A stop disposition on a new-engine adapter-error hold with hold_reason == "adapter_error_frontier" paper-closes with zero adapter invocations.
A stop disposition on a legacy adapter-error hold with transition_lifecycle_reason_refs containing "adapter_error_frontier" paper-closes with zero adapter invocations.
The legacy predicate does not recognize unrelated reason_refs.
The paper-stop path records support evidence only and does not create source truth, quality judgment, success judgment, or Movement authority.
not_proven: No implementation was applied in this read-only design return.
No checker, compileall, git diff --check, mutation probe, or temp-copy full gate was run in this turn.
Exact behavior of a copied real dashboard-productization-0612 root after the proposed implementation is not proven here.
Semantic correctness of the human/COO stop disposition is not proven.
Future Building correctness is not proven.
Source truth, success judgment, quality judgment, and Movement authority are not claimed.
observed_evidence: support/operator/walker_resume.py:213 routes stop dispositions with no recorded Agent returns into _paper_stop_adapter_error_hold only when _adapter_error_hold_without_return returns true.

project/brick-protocol/buildings/dashboard-productization-0612/raw/link.jsonl:3 is a legacy paused transition row with transition_lifecycle_reason_refs including "observation:reroute-hold-reason-adapter_error_frontier" and an adapter-error observation ref, with no observed flat hold_reason field.
support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py:3434-3571 already contains the adapter_error_path_hardening checker family, including F16 zero-adapter-call paper stop coverage and a mutation RED path.
support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py:3725-3799 contains the fixture and stop-disposition helper area where the legacy-shaped pin can be added without creating a new checker family.
returned.output_excerpt: { "observed_evidence": [ "support/operator/walker_resume.py:213 routes stop dispositions with no recorded Agent returns into _paper_stop_adapter_error_hold only when _adapter_error_hold_without_return returns true.", "support/operator/walker_resume.py:435-436 currently recognizes only hold_record.hold_reason == \"adapter_error_frontier\".", "project/brick-protocol/buildings/dashboard-productization-0612/raw/link.jsonl:3 is a legacy paused transition row with transition_lifecycle_reason_refs including \"observation:reroute-hold-reason-adapter_error_frontier\" and an adapter-error observation...
proposed_changes: In support/operator/walker_resume.py, change _adapter_error_hold_without_return to return true when hold_reason is exactly "adapter_error_frontier" or when transition_lifecycle_reason_refs is a list containing a string with the exact substring "adapter_error_frontier".
Keep the refs test narrow: do not match generic "adapter-error", generic "frontier", hyphenated "adapter-error-frontier" alone, or unrelated reason families.

In support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py, add a legacy F16b fixture path under run_adapter_error_path_hardening. Generate a valid temp held root, then rewrite the manifest hold record to remove flat hold_reason and add transition_lifecycle_reason_refs copied from the real legacy shape with synthetic ids.

Append a stop disposition addressed to the same synthetic hold identity, resume with a captured runner, and assert zero invocations, no step_results replay, complete frontier observation, and paper_stop_observation.provider_invoked=false.
Add a mutation probe that temporarily reverts the predicate to flat-field-only and requires the legacy fixture to fail the paper-stop invariant.
relevant_current_structure: The human/COO stop disposition is selected from raw/link.jsonl by pending_target_ref plus the current hold identity.
The paper-stop path records a support Link row, rewrites raw manifest/evidence manifest, and states provider_invoked=false without creating an AgentFact.
The checker family already creates temp Building roots and captured command_runner probes for adapter-error resume behavior.
returned.returned_summary: local CLI Agent Adapter returned support evidence
unchanged_surfaces: No link/*, agent/*, brick/*, project/*, AGENTS.md, pyproject.toml, uv.lock, or .git changes.
No new Movement literal, GateFact, scheduler, queue, retry runtime, provider runtime, dependency, packet echo, or npm/node surface.
No AgentFact shape change and no success, failure, quality, or source-truth classification.
Existing new-engine flat hold_reason behavior remains admitted.
